qa_pairs.question: When requesting resources through the online RAC application form, how does one request both CPU and /project storage resources for a specific cluster like Rorqual?
qa_pairs.answer: To request both CPU resources and /project storage resources on the Rorqual cluster, you must fill in two separate requests: one with the rorqual-compute subsystem for core years and memory, and another one with the rorqual-storage subsystem for /project storage (in TB).

qa_pairs.question: If an applicant needs to request cloud resources for use in multiple different locations, what is the correct procedure within the CCDB portal?
qa_pairs.answer: If you need to request cloud resources in more than one location, then you will have to make one request for each location.

qa_pairs.question: What types of virtual machines (VMs) are available for selection on the Arbutus, Fir, Béluga, and Nibi clouds when requesting cloud resources?
qa_pairs.answer: You can select compute or persistent VMs on the Arbutus, Fir and Béluga clouds, but only persistent VMs on the Nibi cloud.
